title: BasicStatement
description: Object that contains details about one or more aggregated statements.

link.description: Reference path link to fetch more information about the specific statement.

statementDate.description: The date on which the statement is generated.

dueDate.description:
The date by when the minimum payment is due to be paid.

Note- The due date that appears in the statement may differ from the due date at the account-level.

billingPeriodStart.description: Billing starting date for the statement.

billingPeriodEnd.description: Billing end date for the statement.

amountDue.description: The total amount owed at the end of the billing period.

minPaymentDue.description: The minimum amount that the user has to pay every month on the  credit card account.

lastPaymentAmount.description: The last payment made for the previous billing cycle in the current  statement period.

lastPaymentDate.description: The date on which the last payment was made during the billing cycle.

isLatest.description: The field is set to true if the statement is the latest generated  statement.

lastUpdated.description: The date when the account was last updated by Envestnet Yodlee.
